name: public-moly-ald-metallization-demo
description: Synthetic molybdenum ALD metallization process inspired only by public ALTUS Halo / ALD concepts. Not a real equipment recipe.
publicBasis: Lam public materials describe ALTUS Halo as a molybdenum ALD metallization tool for advanced semiconductor devices.
Lam public materials mention quad station module architecture and void-free, low-resistivity molybdenum deposition.
This JSON uses synthetic timing, pressure, temperature, gas, and thickness values for software simulation only.

faultScenarios.name: pumpdown-timeout
faultScenarios.message: Synthetic pump-down timeout: chamber pressure did not reach the public-demo setpoint.

faultScenarios.name: temperature-not-stable
faultScenarios.message: Synthetic temperature fault: wafer temperature did not stabilize before ALD cycles.

faultScenarios.name: precursor-dose-timeout
faultScenarios.message: Synthetic precursor dose timeout during cycle 2.
